name: Pasta and Potato Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dry red wine or grape juice
1 cup cooked and diced red potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot over medium-high heat, sauté onion and celery in olive oil and red wine until the onion is limp but not brown. (Add some stock if the onion starts to stick.)
2. Add garlic, tomatoes, parsley, and carrots; cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add remaining ingredients; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and cook uncovered until vegetables are soft, about 15 minutes.
4. Before serving, puree 1 cup of stew in a blender and add back. Adjust seasonings as needed.
Variation: For a thicker stew, use uncooked diced potatoes and macaroni. Cook until the potatoes and pasta are tender, about 25 minutes instead of the original 15 minutes. Proceed with the remaining steps.
